commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the small live-model matrix, wires live-test-only Ollama provider config/runtime registration, adds focused coverage, and documents local versus remote endpoint selection.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +577, Docs +1. Total +579 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes test-infrastructure coverage rather than reporting a standalone bug. The PR body provides after-change hosted Ollama and Crabbox proof instead of a current-main failure reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the new small-lane Ollama default/override behavior, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: test(agents): include Ollama in small live model matrix
target.body:
## Summary
- add Ollama Gemma to the curated small live model matrix
- make live model discovery auto-enable Ollama provider/plugin config, default local Ollama without leaking `OLLAMA_API_KEY`, and use remote credentials only for remote/Ollama Cloud endpoints
- register the Ollama runtime stream in-process for direct live model probes and document local/remote Ollama selection

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed after rebase to `77b334a9845`; head `34f3e525936`.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/help/testing-live.md src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts` - passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 57 tests.
- `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_QUIET=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 33 tests; provider sweep intentionally skipped without `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS`.
- Local Ollama Cloud probe with `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS='ollama/gemma3:4b'`, `OPENCLAW_LIVE_PROVIDERS='ollama'`, and `OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL='https://ollama.com'` - passed prompt/file-read/image probes, 33 tests.
- AWS Crabbox changed gate + Ollama Cloud probe: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_38df54b1e3b1`, run `run_af9e0b4a5e05`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, cleanup `leaseStopped=true`; forwarded only `OLLAMA_API_KEY`; remote patch applied to base `f13a6150361`, `pnpm check:changed` passed for lanes `core, coreTests, docs`, and remote `ollama/gemma3:4b` prompt/file-read/image probes passed, 33 tests.
- `./.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean after fixing accepted findings around configured local Ollama credentials and avoiding remote-key leakage to local/LAN overrides.
target.author: vincentkoc
